name: squad
description: The lead IS the team. Run from the lead oracle's repo — start / join / say / ls, no team name typed. Loud & clear, no ceremony. Ship tier: WASM (dev fallback: impl.ts, runtime=bun-dev).
author: athena-oracle

cli.help: maw squad <start|join|say|ls> — start | join <oracle> [color] | say <member> <text> | ls  (team = current repo)
